channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Players can apply to join the network test for FromSoftware’s Switch 2 exclusive The Duskbloods today - Video Games Chronicle
item.description:
1. Players can apply to join the network test for FromSoftware’s Switch 2 exclusive The Duskbloods today  Video Games Chronicle
  2. If You’re Struggling To Sign Up For The Duskbloods Network Test, Try This Quick Fix  GameSpot
  3. The Duskbloods Closed Network Test Dates, Times & How To Register  Insider Gaming
  4. How to sign up for The Duskbloods network test  Polygon.com
  5. The Duskbloods Closed Network Test is Now Open for Applications  GamingBolt

item.title: Meet a Devious Pixie Who’ll Trade Treasures for Teeth in This Brand New the Blood of Dawnwalker Quest Gameplay - IGN
item.description:
1. Meet a Devious Pixie Who’ll Trade Treasures for Teeth in This Brand New the Blood of Dawnwalker Quest Gameplay  IGN
  2. Save-game carry-overs and time-leaping sequels: medieval vampire RPG The Blood of Dawnwalker has some bold ideas for the future  Eurogamer.net
  3. The Blood of Dawnwalker’s Big Bad Isn’t a ‘”Mwahaha’ Supervillain,” Says Narrative Director  GamingBolt
  4. The Blood of Dawnwalker confirms no mini-games or Denuvo ahead of launch  AltChar
  5. The Blood of Dawnwalker Physical Release Will Contain the Full Game on Disc  MP1st
